entry_title: Citrix ADC and Gateway Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
entry_summary: Citrix ADC and Citrix Gateway contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows remote attackers to gain unauthorized access to the system. This vulnerability has been exploited in the wild.
entry_content: Citrix ADC and Citrix Gateway contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows remote attackers to gain unauthorized access to the system. This vulnerability affects all supported versions of Citrix ADC and Citrix Gateway. CISA has added this vulnerability to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog based on evidence of active exploitation.
remediation: Update to Citrix ADC and Citrix Gateway 13.1-33.47 or later versions.
